{{Item
| image = Hot_dog.png
| id = hot_dog
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| Properties = Hunger points: 6/10

Regeneration II: 60s.

Absorption II: 60s.
| stackable = 64
| Description = It tastes...funny?
}}Hot Dog is a non-dyeable equipable item that stylizes your dog.


The player can also eat the item lol. It fills up '''6 hunger points''' and gives you:
*'''Resistance II''' for '''60 seconds.'''
*'''Absorption II''' for '''60 seconds.'''
[[File:Hot_dog_display.png|none|thumb|693x693px|The Hottest Dogs]]
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|Red Dye <br> + Yellow Dye <br> + [[Training Treat]] <br> + [[Sausage]] <br> + Bread
|[[File:Hot_dog_crafting.png]]
|}

==Usage==
{{Accessory_use}}
==Trivia==
*It was introduced to DTN 1.17.0.
